Workspace Boundary Enforcement: PathUtils + PolicyGate + PermissionReviewer

Engineering Guideline: Shortest Path No Patches

secret.key (JWT secret + API key encryption key)

Rationale: No config.toml (keep env var config style)
Rationale: Fernet key derived from JWT secret (no extra env var)
Rationale: Isolate High-Frequency Stream Logs to Separate Files
SSE Event Protocol (complete event table + frame format)
Rationale: Independent SSE Channel (POST /turns returns immediately)
Rationale: AgentLoop Has No Side Effects (testable in isolation)
Rationale: mtime Cache for Read-Before-Write Safety
_guidelines_section() (workspace + tool preference injected in system prompt)
Rationale: CapabilityRegistry Stays Pure (no permission logic)
Rationale: Default to ESCALATE on Reviewer API Error (fail safe)
Rationale: Native Rewrite (RN JS single-thread bottleneck)
Rationale: No Bottom Tab Bar (navigation consolidated in SessionPanel)
Rationale: Native LazyColumn vs RN FlatList for Scroll Stability
